headline: Did Kapalua Bay’s Future St. Regis Conversion Subtly Recast Marriott’s (MAR) Luxury Resort Strategy?
summary: Marriott International recently brought The Resort at Kapalua Bay on Maui into its luxury portfolio, assuming management of the 146-key oceanfront property and integrating it into Marriott Bonvoy ahead of a planned conversion to the St. Regis Hotels & Resorts brand in 2027. This move expands Marriott’s presence in Hawaiʻi to nearly 30 open properties with additional projects under development, reinforcing its focus on high-end leisure destinations and branded luxury experiences. Next, we’ll...

headline: Marriott makes another major bet on luxury travelers
summary: Over the last couple of years, airlines and hotels have made profits by adding more luxury offerings, such as first-class seats and upscale rooms and services. The hotel giant Marriott is one of the chains whose luxury offering once again turned out to be the key profit driver in 2025. The ...
